Pricing

Simple, Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. No surprise invoices. Choose the plan that matches your stage — upgrade anytime as you grow.

Starter

Perfect for early-stage founders handling basic compliance

₹7999/monthBilled annually ₹95988
  • Private Limited Incorporation
  • PAN, TAN & GST Registration
  • Monthly GST Return Filing (GSTR-1/3B)
  • Quarterly TDS Returns
  • Annual ROC Compliance (MGT-7, AOC-4)
  • Dedicated Compliance Manager
  • Email & Chat Support
  • Document Vault Access

Growth

For scaling startups needing automation & advisory

₹19999/monthBilled annually ₹239988
  • Everything in Starter
  • Automated Compliance Calendar
  • GST/TDS Health Dashboard
  • Payroll & ESIC/PF Compliance
  • ESOP Policy & Grant Management
  • Board Meeting & Secretarial Support
  • Investor-Ready Data Room

Custom solutions for large organizations & regulated entities

Custom
  • Everything in Growth
  • Multi-Entity Consolidation
  • Transfer Pricing Documentation
  • FEMA & Cross-Border Compliance

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I switch plans later?

Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. Upgrades are prorated, and downgrades apply from the next cycle.

What's included in the free trial for Growth plan?

The 14-day free trial gives you full access to all Growth plan features including the compliance dashboard, automated filings, and advisory calls. No credit card required to start.

Are government fees included in the pricing?

Government fees (MCA, GST, stamp duty, etc.) are separate and charged at actuals. Our pricing covers professional fees, technology platform access, and advisory services only.

Do you offer custom packages for specific needs?

Absolutely. The Enterprise plan is fully customizable. We also offer à la carte services for specific filings, advisory projects, or one-time compliance audits.

What happens if I miss a filing deadline?

Our automated calendar and proactive alerts are designed to prevent this. In the rare event of a missed deadline due to our error, we cover the penalty fees and expedite remediation.

Is my data secure and confidential?

Yes. We use bank-grade encryption (AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit), SOC 2 compliant infrastructure, and strict access controls. Your data never leaves India without explicit consent.

Need a Custom Plan?

Let's Design Your Compliance Stack

Enterprise requirements? Multi-jurisdiction operations? Unique regulatory needs? Our solutions team will architect a custom package.
